calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jan-29-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The court noted that this came down to the petitioner trying to get title for an automobile and that the probate examiner informed the petitioner that this is something that is handled by the Department of Motor Vehicles. The Petition for Spousal Property is off calendar as it is not properly before the court.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
